metadata.description: Armor type catalog with base stats and traits
metadata.usage: Base catalog of armor with inherent stats and traits. Each item has individual properties. Type-level traits apply to all items in category.
notes: Base items used in pattern generation with names.json
Each armor piece has defense, weight, value, and slot-specific stats
Type-level traits (slot, category) apply to all items in that armor type
skillReference uses JSON v4.1 reference format to link to skills
v4.2: Reorganized armor_types by armor class (light-armor, medium-armor, heavy-armor)
